ab: kayan cikah ima isu.
Piling Piho lalu mu, mpu kawas mu la.
en: My name is Piling Piho, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: ima lalu su?
Take Piling lalu mu.
la’i su nya Tayal?
en: Are you ethnic group from the Atayal?

ab: ang, la’i cu nya Tayal.
ch: B:是的，我是泰雅族的小孩。

ab: tayan kwara c’oli utux sali su?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: ang, Tayal kwara c’oli utux sali mu.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是泰雅族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Atayal.

ab: tayan kwara c’oli utux sali su?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: iyat, yaba mu ga Tayal, yaya mu ga Tewan.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是泰雅族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Atayal, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: ima la’i isu?
la’i caku nya Yukan Piho.
yaba su kwaca? pisa kawas nya la?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了？
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: mtiyu pgan kawas nya la.
yaba su kwaca? pisa kawas nya la?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了？
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: iyat, bkis alang myan kwaca, mspat pgan kawas nya la.
ch: B:不是，是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: pisa kawas suyan su likuy la?
mpu spat kawas suyan mu likuy la.
cimu suyan su likuy ga mhenas piyux ci kawas hopa heya?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: mhenas hopa magan kawas heya.
pisa bawi su la?
tehok kbhun mspatun si’em bawi mu.
bsya ini ta pkita la, wa su bawi loyi.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: awha, tehok kbhun mtiyun si’em bawi mu la.
cyu su thuy la?
ini, cyu su mn’u mita la.
cyu su mhekan la?
ini, nyu caku thuy la.
cyu su thuy la ga?
angu, tehok mtiyun kongkin thuy he maku micu la.
